headline: What Makes UPS (UPS) a New Buy Stock
summary: UPS (UPS) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).

headline: Data: Fuel price shocks ripple through freight markets
summary: AFS Logistics and TD Cowen announce the third quarter (Q3) 2026 release of the TD Cowen/AFS Freight Index, a snapshot with predictive pricing for truckload, less-than-truckload (LTL) and parcel transportation markets. This quarter's index shows the effects of oil price shocks rippling through shipping markets, with Q2 data showing rates actualized at higher-than-projected levels. Forward-looking estimates for Q3 expect rates to hold steady at elevated levels, though renewed conflict in the Middl

headline: Should the Postal Service reassess its UPS air contract?
summary: The USPS Office of Inspector General suggested the agency consider if a new deal is the best path forward as it struggles to meet minimum volume requirements.

headline: The Hidden Winners Inside SCHD - July 2026
summary: SCHD has returned just under 2% in the past month, outperforming the S&P 500 ETF SPY by almost 100 bps. Read more on SCHD's holdings here.
